69:         for (const update of updates) {

13: @Component
14: public class SlidingWindowRateLimiter {
15: 
16:     private final Map<Integer, LinkedBlockingDeque<Instant>> windows;
17:     private final int maxRequests;
18:     private final long windowMillis;
19: 
20:     public SlidingWindowRateLimiter(
21:             @Value("${ratelimit.max-requests:100}") int maxRequests,
22:             @Value("${ratelimit.window-seconds:60}") int windowSeconds) {
23:         this.windows = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
24:         this.maxRequests = maxRequests;
25:         this.windowMillis = windowSeconds * 1000L;
26:     }
27: 
28:     public boolean tryAcquire(Integer clientId) {
29:         windows.computeIfAbsent(clientId, k -> new LinkedBlockingDeque<>());
30: 
31:         synchronized (clientId) {
32:             LinkedBlockingDeque<Instant> window = windows.get(clientId);
33:             Instant now = Instant.now();
34:             Instant cutoff = now.minusMillis(windowMillis);
35: 
36:             while (!window.isEmpty() && window.peekFirst().isBefore(cutoff)) {
37:                 window.pollFirst();
38:             }
39: 
40:             if (window.size() >= maxRequests) {
41:                 return false;
42:             }
43: 
44:             window.addLast(now);
45:             return true;
46:         }
47:     }
48: 
49:     public RateLimitStatus getStatus(Integer clientId) {
50:         LinkedBlockingDeque<Instant> window = windows.get(clientId);
51:         if (window == null) {
52:             return new RateLimitStatus(maxRequests, maxRequests, 0);
53:         }
54: 
55:         synchronized (clientId) {
56:             Instant cutoff = Instant.now().minusMillis(windowMillis);
57:             while (!window.isEmpty() && window.peekFirst().isBefore(cutoff)) {
58:                 window.pollFirst();
59:             }
60:             int used = window.size();
61:             return new RateLimitStatus(maxRequests, maxRequests - used, used);
62:         }
63:     }
